title: Unakkagathane Intha Song Lyrics Kattradhu Thamizh
stanzas:
Unakkagathane Intha Song Lyrics Kattradhu Thamizh
#Yuvan #NaMuthukumar

Unakkaagathaane
indha uyir ulladhu.
un thuyaram saaya
en thol ulladhu.
mudiyaamal neelum
naal endrum illai

yaar enna sonnaal enna
anbae unnodu naanum
varuven

oru murai oru murai
nee sirithaal
naan vazhvadhil
artham aagum.

maru murai marumurai
nee sirithaal
en jenmathin saabam theerum

Unakkaagathaane
indha uyir ulladhu.
un thuyaram saaya
en thol ulladhu.
mudiyaamal neelum
naal endrum illai

yaar enna sonnaal enna
anbae unnodu naanum
varuven (2)

oru murai oru murai
nee sirithaal
naan vazhvadhil
artham aagum.

maru murai marumurai
nee sirithaal
en jenmathin saabam theerum

vaan paartha
boomi kaainthaalume
varappendrum azhiyaathadi

thaan paartha pinbam
tholaindhaalume
kannaadi marakkaathadi

mazhai vaasam varugindra
neram ellaam
un viyarvai tharum vaasam
varum allavaa

un ninaivil naan urangum
neram anbe
maranangal vandhaalum
varam allavaa

oru murai oru murai
nee sirithaal
naan vazhvadhil
artham aagum.

maru murai marumurai
nee sirithaal
en jenmathin saabam theerum
unakkaathanaane..

naam irukkum indha nodi
mudinthaalume
ninaivendrum mudiyaathadi

naam edutha nizharpadam
azhindhaalume
nijam endrum azhiyaathadi

naan kaetkum azhagaana
sangeethangal
nee enthan peyar sollum
pozhuthallavaa

en moochin swasangal
unathallavaa
nee indri en vazhkai
pazhuthallavaa

oru murai oru murai
nee sirithaal
naan vazhvadhil
artham aagum.

maru murai marumurai
nee sirithaal
en jenmathin saabam theerum

Unakkaagathaane
indha uyir ulladhu.
un thuyaram saaya
en thol ulladhu.
mudiyaamal neelum
naal endrum illai

yaar enna sonnaal enna
anbae unnodu
naanum varuven (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between two individuals.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Kattradhu Thamizh, the song reflects the protagonist's inner turmoil and emotional struggles related to love.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Yuvan, who is also the music director, showcasing his dual talent in this beautiful track.

When was this song released?

Unakkagathane Intha was released on October 5, 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unakkagathane Intha, the protagonist expresses profound emotions of love and longing, encapsulating the essence of romantic relationships. The song's poignant lyrics by Na Muthukumar, combined with Yuvan's soulful rendition, evoke a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. It serves as a reflection of the character's internal struggles and desires, making it a significant moment in Kattradhu Thamizh. The melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakkagathane Intha from Kattradhu Thamizh is a soul-stirring melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Yuvan's mesmerizing vocals and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of affection. Dive into this enchanting track that perfectly blends emotion with artistry, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: This life belongs to you. Your pain is my burden. There will never be a day without it.
Whoever says anything, my dear, I will come to you too.
If you smile just once, it will give meaning to my life.
If you smile again, it will remove the curse of my birth.
This life belongs to you. Your pain is my burden. There will never be a day without it.
Whoever says anything, my dear, I will come to you too.
If you smile just once, it will give meaning to my life.
If you smile again, it will remove the curse of my birth.
Even if the earth is seen from the sky, it will never disappear.
Even if the happiness seen is lost, the mirror will not forget it.
When the rain comes, it will bring your fragrance, won't it?
The time when I will sleep in your thoughts, even if death comes, isn't it a blessing?
If you smile just once, it will give meaning to my life.
If you smile again, it will remove the curse of my birth.
This life belongs to you. Your pain is my burden. There will never be a day without it.
Whoever says anything, my dear, I will come to you too.
Even if this moment ends, we will never forget it.
Even if the truth we hold is lost, the truth will never disappear.
When I ask for beautiful music, will you tell me your name?
Are my breaths yours? Without you, will my life wither away?
If you smile just once, it will give meaning to my life.
If you smile again, it will remove the curse of my birth.
This life belongs to you. Your pain is my burden. There will never be a day without it.
Whoever says anything, my dear, I will come to you too.
